dataset_label: GRDP per capita (derived from nominal GRDP)
dataset_source: Rosstat (Federal State Statistics Service of Russia)
seo_title: Russia Choropleth Map – Federal Subjects & Regional GRP | Regionify
seo_description: Explore Russia's federal subjects with a choropleth map. View regional GRP per capita (USD, derived) with population and area from public sources. Create maps with Regionify.
seo_keywords: Russia map federal subjects, Russia GRDP map, Russian regions choropleth, oblast map Russia, regional GDP Russia map
intro_text: Russia is the world's largest country by land area, spanning Eastern Europe and Northern Asia. The federation comprises republics, krais, oblasts, cities of federal significance, an autonomous oblast, and autonomous okrugs. Economic output is highly concentrated: resource-rich regions and large metropolitan areas lead GRDP, while sparsely populated areas differ sharply in GRP and population. Choropleth maps make these contrasts visible and support regional analysis at a glance.
